title: talinum portulacifolium
intro: Talinum portulacifolium, also known as the dwarf mallows or Indian kidney berry, is a herbaceous plant belonging to the family Portulacaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Talinum portulacifolium include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern applications.
